name: bolt-ts-starter-template
description: A scaffold template for Slack apps

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: sh -c 'if [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend && npm run build; else echo "frontend directory not present in build context; skipping frontend build"; fi'
scripts.lint: npx @biomejs/biome check *.ts listeners services tests api
scripts.lint:fix: npx @biomejs/biome check --write *.ts listeners services tests api
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run lint && node --import tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts

author: Slack Technologies, LLC
